notes: First-contact visibility check: after one trivial turn the dashboard shows WHICH model the session runs and HOW FULL its context is. pi carries both in the transcript the daemon tails: message.model → ModelName and message.usage → TotalTokens; ComputeContextUtilization resolves the window from the LiteLLM capacity table. At record time the boot model was gpt-5.4-mini (NOT the gpt-5.5 the assessment projected — pi's default had moved), which resolves in the capacity cache with context_window 272000, so utilization > 0. The phase DSL asserts the state arc; the model assertion is evidenced by the staged-replay golden AFTER turn_end (summary.model_name = gpt-5.4-mini).

text: Turn completes back to ready; SessionMetrics.ModelName = the boot model (gpt-5.4-mini at record time, not 'unknown') and context utilization > 0 (window 272000 from the capacity table)
